name: collection_page_6_collections_body

observed_strengths.observation: Body collection combines cologne, balm, deodorant, wash — cross-category bundling opportunity surfaced in a single collection
Entertaining meta description: 'Want all of your nooks, crannies, cracks, crevices, and pits to smell as awesome as your beard? Of course you do.' — brand voice that drives click-through

missing_or_weak.observation: Scent families (Norse Winter, Bold Fortune, etc.) appear without benefit or use-case descriptor — first-time buyer can't determine which scent is right for them without clicking each
No quiz or scent selector on collection page — conversion opportunity for first-time buyers who don't know which scent to choose

purchase_path_notes: Body collection groups cologne with care products — natural cross-sell environment. Fragrance lines carry the same scent across multiple formats (cologne, beard oil, balm) which enables the 'build your routine' bundle pitch.
